methodsAttempted.query: University of Ioannina generative AI policy OR guidelines site:uoi.gr
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned mostly event, research, course, and thesis results; no central binding AI policy page was found.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uoi.gr ChatGPT University of Ioannina policy OR guidelines OR students OR thesis
methodsAttempted.notes: Search results were repository theses, course/publication PDFs, and library materials; thesis and research outputs were not used as policy evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uoi.gr τεχνητή νοημοσύνη οδηγίες φοιτητές εργασίες Πανεπιστήμιο Ιωαννίνων
methodsAttempted.notes: Greek-language search found official event/training pages, a course description, and repository records.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uoi.gr τεχνητής νοημοσύνης ακαδημαϊκή ακεραιότητα Πανεπιστήμιο Ιωαννίνων
methodsAttempted.notes: Greek-language search found the Library learning object on academically appropriate AI use plus repository/conference records.

robots.txt for uoi.gr and lib.uoi.gr allowed the public paths except wp-admin; lib.uoi.gr fetched with HTTP 200, while the main uoi.gr event page returned 403 to plain curl but was retrievable through Firecrawl without bypassing an access-control challenge.

artifacts.summary: Official University of Ioannina sources found here support narrow claims about AI-related library instruction and student training, not a binding university-wide generative AI policy. Repository, course, and event-only hits were either rejected or scoped narrowly.

artifacts.claimText: The University of Ioannina Library and Information Center offers a Greek-language learning object on academically appropriate AI use for literature-review work, including selecting AI tools, evaluating outputs, using outputs, and citing AI sources.

Οι στόχοι της θεματικής είναι ... Αναζήτηση και επιλογή κατάλληλων εργαλείων AI ... Αξιολόγηση αποτελεσμάτων ... Αξιοποίηση αποτελεσμάτων ... Αναφορά αποτελεσμάτων (citing AI sources)

artifacts.title: University of Ioannina AI Guidance Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: Staged two agent-reviewed, evidence-backed claim candidates for the University of Ioannina. The claims are limited to official Library instruction and Student Support Unit training pages; no binding university-wide generative AI policy was found in this crawl.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding University of Ioannina generative AI policy was identified in this run; event, repository, course, and research pages were not used to make broad policy claims.
The uoi.gr event page returned HTTP 403 to plain curl, but robots.txt allowed the path and Firecrawl retrieved the public page content.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
